block.header: wa ga sekwo ga asake no sugata yoku mizute kyepu no apida wo kwopwikurasu kamo
wa ga kokoro tomosimi omopeba arataywo no pitoywo mo otizu ime ni miyekoso
utukusimi wa ga omopu imo wo pito mwina no yuku goto mime ya te ni makazusite
ko no koro no i no nerayenu pa sikitapeno tamakura makite nemaku pore koso
wasuru ya to monogatari site kokoro yari sugusedo sugwizu napo kwopwinikyeri
yworu mo nezu yasuku mo arazu sirwotapeno koromo pa nukazi tadani apu madeni
noti mo apamu wa ni na kwopwi so to imo pa ipedo kwopuru apida ni tosi pa penitutu
tadani apazu aru pa ube nari ime ni dani nani si ka pito no koto no sigekyemu
ututu ni pa ube mo apanaku ime ni sape nani si ka pito no koto no sigekyemu
nubatamano so no ime ni dani miyetugu ya swode puru pi naku ware pa kwopuru wo
ututu ni pa tadani pa apane ime ni dani apu to miyekoso wa ga kwopuraku ni
pito ni miyuru upe pa musubite pito no minu sitabimo akete kwopuru pi so opoki
pitogoto no sigeki toki ni pa wagimokwo si koromo ni ariseba sita ni kimasi wo
matamatuku woti wo si kanete omope koso pitopye no koromo pitori kite nure
sirwotapeno wa ga pimo no wo no tayenu ma ni kwopwimusubi semu apamu pi madeni
nipibari no ima tukuru miti sayakani mo kikitekyeru kamo imo ga upe no koto wo
yamasiro no ipata no mori ni kokoro osoku tamuke sitare ya imo ni apikataki
suganoneno nemokorogoroni teru pi ni mo pwime ya wa ga swode imo ni apazusite
imo ni kwopwi inenu asita ni puku kaze pa imo ni si pureba wa ni mo purekoso
asukagapa takagapa yokasi kwoyekosi wo makoto koyopi pa akezu mo yukanu ka
yaturigapa minasoko tayezu yuku midu no tugite so kwopuru ko no tosikoro wo
yaturigapa miwo mo taye sezu yuku midu no tugite so kwopuru ko no tosikoro wo
iswo no upe ni opuru kwomatu no na wo wosimi pito ni sirayezu kwopwiwataru kamo
ipa no upe ni tateru kwomatu no na wo wosimi pito ni pa ipazu kwopwiwataru kamo
yamagapa no midukage ni opuru yamasuge no yamazu mo imo pa omopoyuru kamo
asapanwo ni tatikamusaburu suganoneno nemokoro tare yuwe wa ga kwopwinaku ni
takapanwo ni tatisinapitaru suganoneno nemokoro tare yuwe wa ga kwopwinaku ni
wa ga sekwo wo ima ka ima ka to mati woru ni ywo no pukeyukeba nagekituru kamo
tamakusiro makinuru imo mo araba koso ywo no nagaki mo uresikaru beki
pitoduma ni ipu pa ta ga koto sagoromo no ko no pimo tokye to ipu pa ta ga koto
kaku bakari kwopwimu mono so to siramaseba so no ywo pa yutani aramasi monowo
kwopwitutu mo noti mo apamu to omope koso ono ga inoti wo nagaku pori sure
ima pa wa pa sinamu yo wagimo apazusite omopiwatareba yasukyeku mo nasi
wa ga sekwo ga komu to katarisi ywo pa sugwinu siweya sarasara sikorikome ya mo
pitogoto no yokosu wo kikite tamapokono miti ni mo apazi to ipitesi wagimo
apanaku mo usi to omopeba iya masini pitogoto sigeku kikoyekuru kamo
satwobito mo kataritugu gane yosiweyasi kwopwite mo sinamu ta ga na narame ya
tasikanaru tukapi wo namito kokoro wo so tukapi ni yarisi ime ni miyeki ya
ametuti ni sukwosi itaranu masurawo to omopisi ware ya wogokoro mo naki
satwo tikaku ipye ya woru beki ko no wa ga me pitome wo situtu kwopwi no sigekyeku
itu pa namo kwopwizu ari to pa aranedomo utate ko no koro kwopwi si sigesi mo
nubatamano inetesi yupubye no monomopi ni sakenisi mune pa yamu toki mo nasi
miswora yuku na no wosikyeku mo ware pa nasi apanu pi maneku tosi no penureba
ututu ni mo ima mo mitesika ime nomwi ni tamoto maki nu to mireba kurusi mo
wagimokwo wo ima mo mitesika ime nomwi ni tamoto maki nu to mireba kurusi mo
tatite wite subye no tadoki mo ima pa nasi imo ni apazute tukwi no penureba
tatite wite subye no tadoki mo ima pa nasi kimi ga me mizute tukwi no penureba
apazusite kwopwiwataru tomo wasureme ya iya pinikyeni pa omopimasu tomo
yosome ni mo kimi ga sugata wo miteba koso wa ga kwopwiyamame inoti sinazupa
yosome ni mo kimi ga sugata wo miteba koso inoti ni mukapu wa ga kwopwiyamame
kwopwitutu mo kyepu pa aramedo tamakusige akenamu asu wo ikani kurasamu
saywo pukete imo wo omopide sikitapeno makura mo soyoni nagekituru kamo
pitogoto pa makoto kotitaku narinu tomo soko ni saparamu ware ni aranaku ni
tatite wite tadoki mo sirazu wa ga kokoro ama tu swora nari tuti pa pumedomo
yo no naka no pito no kotoba to omoposu na makoto so kwopwisi apanu pi wo opomi
ide na zo kokodaku kwopuru wagimokwo ga apazi to ipyeru koto mo aranaku ni
nubatamano ywo wo nagami ka mo wa ga sekwo ga ime ni ime ni si miyekapyeru ramu
aratamano tosinowo nagaku kaku kwopwiba makoto wa ga inoti matakarame ya mo
omopiyaru subye no tadoki mo ware pa nasi apazute maneku tukwi no penureba
asita yukite yupupye pa kimasu kimi yuweni yuyusiku mo a pa nagekituru kamo
kikisi ywori mono wo omopeba wa ga mune pa warete kudakete twogokoro mo nasi
pitogoto wo sigemi kotitami wagimokwo ni inisi tukwi ywori imada apanu kamo
utagatamo ipitutu mo aru ka ware naraba tuti ni pa otizu swora ni kenamasi
ikanaramu pi no toki ni ka mo wagimokwo ga mobiki no sugata asani keni mimu
pitori wite kwopureba kurusi tamatasuki kakezu wasuremu kotopakari moga
nakanakani moda mo aramasi wo adukinaku apimisomete mo ware pa kwopuru ka
wagimokwo ga wemapimaywobiki omokage ni kakarite motona omopoyuru kamo
akanesasu pi no kurenureba subye wo nami titabi nagekite kwopwitutu so woru
wa ga kwopwi pa yworu piru wakazu momopye nasu kokoro si omopeba ita mo subye nasi
itonokite usuki maywone wo itadurani kakasimetutu mo apanu pito kamo
kwopwikwopwite noti mo apamu to nagusamoru kokoro si nakupa ikite arame ya mo
ikubaku mo ikyerazi inoti wo kwopwitutu so ware pa ikiduku pito ni sirayezu
pitokuni ni ywobapi ni yukite tati ga wo mo imada tokaneba saywo so akenikyeru
masurawo no satoki kokoro mo ima pa nasi kwopwi no yatukwo ni ware pa sinu besi
tune kaku si kwopureba kurusi simasiku mo kokoro yasumemu kotopakari seyo
oborokani ware si omopaba pitoduma ni ari to ipu imo ni kwopwitutu arame ya
kokoro ni pa tipye ni momopye ni omopyeredo pitome wo opomi imo ni apanu kamo
pitome opomi me koso sinobure sukunaku mo kokoro no uti ni wa ga omopanaku ni
pito no mite kototogame senu ime ni ware koyopi itaramu yadwo sasu na yume
itu madeni ikamu inoti so oborokani kwopwitutu arazupa sinamu masareri
utukusi to omopu wagimo wo ime ni mite okwite saguru ni naki ga sabusisa
imo to ipaba namyesi kasikwosi sikasugani kakemaku posiki koto ni aru kamo
tamakatuma apamu to ipu pa tare naru ka apyeru toki sape omokakusi suru
ututu ni ka imo ga kimaseru ime ni ka mo ware ka matwopyeru kwopwi no sigeki ni
opokata pa nani ka mo kwopwimu kotoage sezu imo ni yori nemu tosi pa tikaki wo
putari site musubisi pimo wo pitori site ware pa tokimizi tadani apu made pa
sinamu inoti koko pa omopazu tadasikumo imo ni apazaru koto wo si so omopu
tawayamye pa oyazi kokoro ni simasiku mo yamu toki mo naku mitemu to so omopu
yupu saraba kimi ni apamu to omope koso pi no kururaku mo uresikarikyere
tada kyepu mo kimi ni pa apamedo pitogoto wo sigemi apazute kwopwiwataru kamo
yononaka ni kwopwi sigekyemu to omopaneba kimi ga tamoto wo makanu ywo mo ariki
midorikwo no tame koso omo pa motomu to ipe ti nome ya kimi ga omo motomu ramu
kuyasiku mo oinikyeru kamo wa ga sekwo ga motomuru omo ni yukamasi monowo
uraburete karenisi swode wo mata makaba sugwinisi kwopwi i midarekomu kamo
onogasisi pito sini su rasi imo ni kwopwi pinikyeni yasenu pito ni sirayezu
yopiyopi ni wa ga tatimatu ni kedasiku mo kimi kimasazupa kurusikaru besi
ikyeru yo ni kwopwi to ipu mono wo apimineba kwopwi no uti ni mo ware so kurusiki
omopitutu woreba kurusi mo nubatamano yworu ni itaraba ware koso yukame
kokoro ni pa moyete omopedo utusemi no pitome wo sigemi imo ni apanu kamo
apiomopazu kimi pa masamedo katakwopwi ni ware pa so kwopuru kimi ga sugata ni
adisapapu me pa akazarane tadusapari kototopanaku mo kurusikarikyeri
aratamano tosinowo nagaku itu made ka wa ga kwopwi woramu inoti sirazute
ima pa a pa sinamu yo wa ga se kwopwi sureba pitoywo pitopi mo yasukyeku mo nasi
sirwotapeno swode worikapyesi kwopureba ka imo ga sugata no ime ni si miyuru
pitogoto wo sigemi kotitami wa ga sekwo wo me ni pa miredomo apu yosi mo nasi
kwopu to ipeba usuki koto nari sikaredomo ware pa wasurezi kwopwi pa sinu tomo
nakanakani sinaba yasukyemu iduru pi no iru waki siranu ware si kurusi mo
omopiyaru tadwoki mo ware pa ima pa nasi imo ni apazute tosi no penureba
wa ga sekwo ni kwopu to ni si a rasi midorikwo no ywonaki wo situtu inekatenaku pa
wa ga inoti no nagaku posikyeku itupari wo yoku suru pito wo torapu bakari wo
pitogoto wo sigemito imo ni apazusite kokoro no uti ni kwopuru ko no koro
tamadusano kimi ga tukapi wo matisi ywo no nagori so ima mo inenu ywo no opoki
tamapokono miti ni yukiapite yosome ni mo mireba yoki kwo wo itu to ka matamu
omopi ni si amarinisikaba subye wo nami ware pa ipiteki imu beki monowo
omopi ni si amarinisikaba kadwo ni idete wa ga koipusu wo pito mikyemu kamo
omopi ni si amarinisikaba subye wo nami idete so yukisi ipye no atari mi ni
omopu ni si amarinisikaba nipodorino nadusapikosi wo pito mikyemu kamo
asu no pi pa so no kadwo yukamu idete miyo kwopwitaru sugata amata sirukyemu
utate kyeni kokoro ibusesi kotopakari yoku se wa ga sekwo apyeru toki dani
wagimokwo ga ywotwode no sugata mitesi ywori kokoro swora nari tuti pa pumedomo
tubakiti no ya swo no timata ni tatinarasi musubisi pimo wo tokamaku wosi mo
ono ga yo no otoropenureba sirwotapeno swode no narenisi kimi wo si so omopu
kimi ni kwopwi wa ga naku namita sirwotapeno swode sape pitite semu subye mo nasi
ima ywori pa apazi to sure ya sirwotapeno wa ga koromode no puru toki mo naki
ime ka to kokoro pa matwopu tukwi maneku karenisi kimi ga koto no kaywopeba
aratamano tositukwi kanete nubatamano ime ni miyekyeri kimi ga sugata pa
ima ywori pa kwopu tomo imo ni apame ya mo toko no pye sarazu ime ni miyekoso
pito no mite koto togame senu ime ni dani yamazu miyekoso wa ga kwopwiyamamu
pitome opomi tadani pa apane ime ni dani yamazu miyekoso wa ga kwopwiyamamu
ututu ni pa koto pa tayetari ime ni dani tugite miyekoso tadani apu madeni
utusemi no utusigokoro mo ware pa nasi imo wo apimizute tosi no penureba
utusemi no tune no kotoba to omopedomo tugite si kikeba kokoro matwopu
sirwotapeno swode namezu nuru nubatamano koyopi pa paya mo akeba akenamu
sirwotapeno tamoto yutakeku pito no nuru umai pa nezu ya kwopwiwatarinamu
kaku nomwi ni arikyeru kimi wo kinu ni araba sita ni mo kimu to wa ga omopyerikyeru
turupami no apase no koromo urani seba ware sipwime ya mo kimi ga kimasanu
kurenawi no ususomekoromo asarakani apimisi pito ni kwopuru koro kamo
tosi no peba mitutu sinwopye to imo ga ipisi koromo no nupime mireba kanasi mo
turupami no pitopye no koromo ura mo naku aru ramu kwo yuwe kwopwiwataru kamo
tokikinuno omopimidarete kwopuredomo nani no yuwe so to twopu pito mo nasi
tukwisome no asarano koromo asarakani omopite imo ni apamu mono kamo
opokimi no sipo yaku ama no pudikoromo nare pa suredomo iya medurasi mo
akakinu no pitura no kinu nagaku pori wa ga omopu kimi ga miyenu koro kamo
matamatuku wotikoti kanete musubituru wa ga sitabimo no tokuru pi arame ya
murasaki no obi no musubi mo toki mo mizu motona ya imo ni kwopwiwatarinamu
komanisiki pimo no musubi mo tokisakezu ipapite matedo sirusi naki kamo
murasaki no wa ga sitapimo no iro ni idezu kwopwi ka mo yasemu apu yosi wo nami
naniyuwe ka omopazu aramu pimonowono kokoro ni irite kwoposiki monowo
maswokagami mimase wa ga sekwo wa ga katami moteramu toki ni apazarame ya mo
maswokagami tadameni kimi wo miteba koso inoti ni mukapu wa ga kwopwiyamame
maswokagami miakanu imo ni apazusite tukwi no penureba ikyeri tomo nasi
papurira ga ipapu mimoro no maswokagami kakete so sinwopu apu pito gotoni
pari pa aredo imo si nakyereba tukeme ya to ware wo nayamasi tayuru pimo no wo
komaturugi wa ga kokorokara yoso nomwi ni mitutu ya kimi wo kwopwiwatarinamu
turugitati na no wosikyeku mo ware pa nasi ko no koro no ma no kwopwi no sigeki ni
adusayumi suwe pa si sirazu sikaredomo masaka pa kimi ni yorinisi monowo
adusayumi suwe no taduki pa siranedomo kokoro pa kimi ni yorinisi monowo
adusayumi piki mi yurupe mi omopi mite sudeni kokoro pa yorinisi monowo
adusayumi pikite yurupenu masurawo ya kwopwi to ipu mono wo sinobwikanetemu
adusayumi suwe no nakakoro yodomyerisi kimi ni pa apinu nageki pa yamemu
imasarani nani si ka omopamu adusayumi piki mi yurupe mi yorinisi monowo
wotomyera ga umiwo no tatari utiswo kake umu toki nasi ni kwopwiwataru kamo
taratineno papa ga kapu kwo no maywo komori ibuseku mo aru ka imo ni apazusite

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,3@馬聲蜂音石花蜘蹰荒鹿,*

block.header: tamatasuki kakeneba kurusi kaketareba tugite mimaku no posiki kimi kamo
murasaki no simi no kadura no panayakani kyepu miru pito ni noti kwopwimu kamo
tamakadura kakenu toki naku kwopuredomo nani si ka imo ni apu toki mo naki
apu yosi no idekuru made pa tatamikomo kasaneamu kazu ime ni si miyemu
sirakatuku yupu pa panamono koto kosoba itu no masaka mo tune wasurayene
iswonokami puru no takapasi takatakani imo ga matu ramu ywo so pukenikyeru
minatwoiri no asiwakewobune sapari opomi ima komu ware wo yodomu to omopu na
minatwoiri no asiwakewobune sapari opomi kimi ni apazute tosi so penikyeru
midu wo opomi age ni tane maki piye wo opomi erayuru nari so wa ga pitori nuru
tama apaba apinuru monowo woyamada no sisida moru goto papa si morasu mo
tama apaba apinuru monowo woyamada no sisida moru goto papa ga morasisi
kasuganwo ni tereru yupupi no yoso nomwi ni kimi wo apimite ima so kuyasiki
asipikwino yama ywori iduru tukwi matu to pito ni pa ipite imo matu ware wo
yupudukuywo akatokiyamwi no opoposiku misi pito yuweni kwopwiwataru kamo
pisakatano ama tu miswora ni teru tukwi no usenamu pi koso wa ga kwopwiyamame
moti no pi ni sasiiduru tukwi no takatakani kimi wo imasete nani wo ka omopamu
tukuywo yomi kadwo ni idetati asiura site yuku toki sape ya imo ni apazu aramu
nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi no sayakekupa yoku mitemasi wo kimi ga sugata wo
asipikwino yama wo kodakami yupudukwi wo itu ka to kimi wo matu ga kurusisa
turupami no kinu tokiarapi matutiyama moto tu pito ni pa napo sikazukyeri
sapogapa no kapanami tatazu sidukeku mo kimi ni tagupite asu sape moga mo
wagimokwo ni koromo kasuga no yosikigapa yosi mo aranu ka imo ga me wo mimu
tonogumori ame puru kapa no sazarenami manaku mo kimi pa omopoyuru kamo
wagimokwo ya a wo wasurasu na iswonokami swode purukapa no tayemu to omope ya
miwayama no yamasita toyomi yuku kapa no miwo si tayezupa noti mo wa ga tuma
kamwi no goto kikoyuru tagi no siranami no omo siru kimi ga miyenu ko no koro
yamagapa no tagi ni masareru kwopwi su to so pito sirinikyeru manaku si omopeba
asipikwino yamagapa midu no oto ni idezu pito no kwo yuweni kwopwiwataru kamo
kose ni aru notosenokapa no noti mo apamu imo ni pa ware pa ima ni arazu tomo
arapikinu torikapigapa no kapayodo no yodomamu kokoro omopikanetu mo
ikaruga no yoruka no ike no yorosiku mo kimi wo ipaneba omopi so wa ga suru
komorinuno sita yu pa kwopwimu itisirwoku pito no siru beku nageki seme ya mo
yukupye nami komoreru wonu no sitamopi ni ware so monomopu ko no koro no apida
komorinuno sita yu kwopwiamari siranamino itisirwoku idenu pito no siru beku
imo ga me wo mimaku poriye no sazarenami sikite kwopwitutu ari to tugekoso
ipabasiru tarumi no midu no pasikiyasi kimi ni kwopuraku wa ga kokorokara
kimi pa kozu ware pa yuwe naku tatu nami no sikusiku wabwisi kakute kozi to ya
apuminoumi pyeta pa pito siru oki tu nami kimi wo okite pa siru pito mo nasi
opoumi no soko wo pukamete musubitesi imo ga kokoro pa utagapi mo nasi
sada no ura ni yosuru siranami apida naku omopu wo nani ka imo ni apikataki
omopiidete subye naki toki pa amakumo no okuka mo sirazu kwopwitutu so woru
amakumono tayutapiyasuki kokoro araba ware wo na tanome so mataba kurusi mo
kimi ga atari mitutu mo woramu ikwomayama kumo na tanabiki ame pa puru tomo
nakanakani nani ka sirikyemu wa ga yama ni moyuru keburi no yoso ni mimasi wo
wagimokwo ni kwopwi subye nakari mune wo atumi asatwo akureba miyuru kwiri kamo
akatoki no asagwiri gomori kapyerabani nani si ka kwopwi no iro ni idenikyeru
omopiiduru toki pa subye nami sapoyama ni tatu amagwiri no kenu beku omopoyu
kirimeyama yukikapyeridi no asagasumi ponokani dani ya imo ni apazaramu
kaku kwopwimu mono to siriseba yupubye okite asita pa kenuru tuyu ni aramasi wo
yupubye okite asita pa kenuru siratuyu no kenu beki kwopwi mo ware pa suru kamo
noti tupini imo pa apamu to asatuyuno inoti pa ikyeri kwopwi pa sigekyedo
asanasana kusa no upe sirwoku oku tuyu no kenaba tomoni to ipisi kimi pa mo
asapi sasu kasuga no wonwo ni oku tuyu no kenu beki wa ga mwi wosikyeku mo nasi
tuyusimono keyasuki wa ga mwi oinu tomo mata wotikapyeri kimi wo si matamu
kimi matu to nipa ni si woreba utinabiku wa ga kurwokami ni simo so okinikyeru
kimi matu to nipa ni si woreba sirwotapeno wa ga koromode ni simo so okinikyeru
asasimo no kenu beku nomwi ya toki nasi ni omopiwataramu iki no wo nisite
sasanami no nami kwosu aza ni puru kwosame apida mo okite wa ga omopanaku ni
kamusabwite ipapo ni opuru matu ga ne no kimi ga kokoro pa wasurekanetu mo
mikari suru karipa no wonwo no narasiba no nare pa masarazu kwopwi koso masare
sakurawo no wopu no sitakusa payaku opwiba imo ga sitabimo tokazaramasi wo
kasuganwo ni asadisime yupi tayeme ya to wa ga omopu pito pa iya toponagani
asipikwino yama suganoneno nemokoroni ware pa so kwopuru kimi ga sugata wo
asipikwino yama suganoneno nemokoroni wa ga omopu pito wo mimu yosi moga mo
kakitupata sakisapa ni opuru suganoneno tayu to ya kimi ga miyenu ko no koro
asipikwino yama suganoneno nemokoroni yamazu omopaba imo ni apamu kamo
apiomopazu aru monowo kamo suganoneno nemokorogoroni wa ga omopyeru ramu
yamasuge no yamazute kimi wo omope ka mo wa ga kokorodwo no ko no koro pa naki
imo ga kadwo yukisugwikanete kusa musubu kaze pukitoku na mata kapyerimimu
imo ga kadwo yukisugwikanete kusa musubu kaze pukitoku na tadani apu madeni
asadipara tipu ni asi pumi kokorogumi wa ga omopu kwora ga ipye no atari mitu
asadipara tipu ni asi pumi kokorogumi wa ga omopu imo ga ipye no atari mitu
utipisasu miya ni pa aredo tukwikusano uturopu kokoro wa ga omopanaku ni
momo ni ti ni pito pa ipu tomo tukwikusano uturopu kokoro ware motame ya mo
wasurekusa wa ga pimo ni tuku toki to naku omopiwatareba ikyeri tomo nasi
akatoki no mesamasikusa to kore wo dani mitutu imasite ware wo sinwopase
wasurekusa kaki mo simimini uwetaredo sikono sikokusa napo kwopwinikyeri
asadipara wonwo ni sime yupu munakoto mo apamu to kikose kwopwi no nagusa ni
asadipara wonwo ni sime yupu munakoto mo komu to sirasesi kimi wo si matamu
pito mwina no kasa ni nupu to ipu arimasuge arite noti ni mo apamu to so omopu
miyosinwo no akidunowonwo ni karu kaya no omopimidarete nuru ywo si so opoki
imo matu to mikasanoyama no yamasuge no yamazu ya kwopwimu inoti sinazupa
tani sebami minepye ni papyeru tamakadura papete si araba tosi ni kozu tomo
tani sebami minepye ni papyeru ipatuna no papete si araba tosi ni kozu tomo
midukukwino woka no kuzupa wo pukikapyesi omo siru kwora ga miyenu koro kamo
akagwoma no iyuki pabakaru makuzupara nani no tutekoto tadani si yokyemu
yuputatami tanakamiyama no sanakadura arisarite si mo ima narazu tomo
tanipadi no opoye no yama no matamadura tayemu no kokoro wa ga omopanaku ni
oposaki no ariswo no watari papukuzuno yukupye mo naku ya kwopwiwatarinamu
yupututumi siratukwiyama no sanakadura noti mo kanarazu apamu to so omopu
yuputatami siratukwiyama no sanakadura tayemu to imo wo wa ga omopanaku ni
panezuirono uturopiyasuki kokoro nareba tosi wo so kipuru koto pa tayezute
kaku site so pito no sinu to ipu pudinami no tada pitome nomwi misi pito yuweni
suminoye no sikitu no ura no nanoriso no na pa noritesi wo apanaku mo ayasi
misagwo wiru ariswo ni opuru nanoriso no yosi na pa norase oya pa siru tomo
nami no muta nabiku tamamo no katamopini wa ga omopu pito no koto no sigekyeku
watatumi no oki tu tamamo no nabiki nemu paya kimase kimi mataba kurusi mo
watatumi no oki ni opwitaru napanori no na pa sane norazi kwopwi pa sinu tomo
tama no wo wo katawo ni yorite wo wo ywowami midaruru toki ni kwopwizu arame ya mo
kimi ni apazu pisasiku narinu tamanowono nagaki inoti no wosikyeku mo nasi
kwopuru koto masareba ima pa tamanowono tayete midarete sinu beku omopoyu
amawotomye kadukitoru to ipu wasuregapi yo ni mo wasurezi imo ga sugata pa
asakage ni wa ga mwi pa narinu tamakagiru ponokani miyete inisi kwo yuweni
nakanakani pito to arazupa kupakwo ni mo naramasi monowo tama no wo bakari
masugayosi swoga no kapara ni naku tidori manasi wa ga sekwo wa ga kwopuraku pa
kwopwigoromo ki naranoyama ni naku tori no manaku toki nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa
topotupito karidi no ike ni sumu tori no tatite mo wite mo kimi wo si so omopu
asipye yuku kamo no paoto no oto nomwi ni kikitutu motona kwopwiwataru kamo
kamo sura mo ono ga tumadwoti asari site okururu potwo ni kwopu to ipu monowo
siramayumi pwida no posoye no sugadori no imo ni kwopure ka i wo nekaneturu
sinwo no upe ni kiwite naku tori me wo yasumi pitoduma yuweni ware kwopwinikyeri
monomopu to inezu okwitaru asake ni pa wabwite naku nari nipatutori sape
asagarasu payaku na naki so wa ga sekwo ga asake no sugata mireba kanasi mo
umasegwosi ni mugi pamu kwoma no norayuredo napo si kwopwisiku omopikanetu mo
sapinokuma pinokumakapa ni uma todome uma ni midukapye ware yoso ni mimu
onore yuwe norayete woreba awouma no omotakabuta ni norite ku besi ya
murasaki wo kusa to wakuwaku pusu sika no nwo pa kotonisite kokoro pa oyazi
omopanu wo omopu to ipaba matorisumu unate no mori no kamwi si sirasamu
murasaki pa papi sasu mono so tubakiti no ya swo no timata ni apyeru kwo ya tare
taratineno papa ga ywobu na wo mawosamedo miti yuku pito wo tare to sirite ka
apanaku pa sika mo arinamu tamadusano tukapi wo dani mo mati ya kanetemu
apamu to pa titabi omopedo arigaywopu pitome wo opomi kwopwitutu so woru
pitome opomi tadani apazusite kedasiku mo wa ga kwopwisinaba ta ga na naramu mo
apimimaku pori sureba koso kimi ywori mo ware so masarite ipukasimi sure
utusemi no pitome wo sigemi apazusite tosi no penureba ikyeri tomo nasi
utusemi no pitome sigekupa nubatamano yworu no ime n i wo tugite miyekoso
nemokoroni omopu wagimo wo pitogoto no sigeki ni yorite yodomu koro kamo
pitogoto no sigeku si araba kimi mo ware mo tayemu to ipite apisi mono kamo
subye mo naki katakwopwi wo su to ko no koro ni wa ga sinu beki pa ime ni miyeki ya
ime ni mite koromo wo toriki yosopu ma ni imo ga tukapi so sakini kinikyeru
ariarite noti mo apamu to koto nomwi wo katameipitutu apu to pa nasi ni
kipamarite ware mo apamu to omopedomo pito no koto koso sigeki kimi ni are
iki no wo ni wa ga ikidukisi imo sura wo pitoduma nari to kikeba kanasi mo
wa ga yuwe ni itaku na wabwi so noti tupini apazi to ipisi koto mo aranaku ni
kadwo tatete two mo sasite aru wo iduku yu ka imo ga irikite ime ni miyeturu
kadwo tatete two pa sasitaredo nusubito no poreru ana ywori irite miyekyemu
asu ywori pa kwopwitutu aramu koyopi dani payaku yopi ywori pimo tokye wagimo
imasarani neme ya wa ga sekwo arataywo no pitoywo mo otizu ime ni miyekoso
wa ga sekwo ga tukapi wo matu to kasa mo kizu idetutu so misi ame no puraku ni
kokoro naki ame ni mo aru ka pitome mori tomosiki imo ni kyepu dani apamu wo
tada pitori nuredo nekanete sirwotapeno swode wo kasa ni ki nuretutu so kosi
ame mo puri ywo mo pukenikyeri imasarani kimi yukame ya mo pimo tokimakena
pisakatano ame no puru pi wo wa ga kadwo ni minokasa kizute kyeru pito ya tare
makimuku no anasi no yama ni kumowitutu ame pa puredomo nuretutu so kosi
watarapi no opokapa no pye no wakapisagwi wa ga pisanaraba imo kwopwimu kamo
wagimokwo wo ime ni miyeko to yamatodi no watarize gotoni tamuke so wa ga suru
sakurabana saki ka mo tiru to miru madeni tare kamo koko ni miyete tiriyuku
toyokuni no kiku no pamamatu nemokoroni nani si ka imo ni apiipisomekyemu
tukwi kapete kimi woba mimu to omope ka mo pi mo kapezusite kwopwi no sigekyeku
na yuki so to kapyeri mo ku ya to kapyerimi ni yukedo kapyerazu miti no nagate wo
tabi nisite imo wo omopiide itisirwoku pito no siru beku nageki semu kamo
satwo panare topoku aranaku ni kusamakura tabi to si omopeba napo kwopwinikyeri
tikaku areba na nomwi mo kikite nagusametu koyopi yu kwopwi no iya masarinamu
tabi ni arite kwopureba kurusi itusikamo miyakwo ni yukite kimi ga me wo mimu
topoku areba sugata pa miyezu tune no goto imo ga wemapi pa omokage nisite
tosi mo pezu kapyerikinamu to asakage ni matu ramu imo si omokage ni miyu
tamapokono miti ni idetati wakarekosi pi ywori omopu ni wasururu toki nasi
pasikiyasi sika aru kwopwi ni mo arisi kamo kimi ni okurete kwoposiku omopeba
kusamakura tabi no kanasiku aru napeni imo wo apimite noti kwopwimu kamo
kuni topomi tadani pa apazu ime ni dani ware ni miyekoso apamu pi madeni
kaku kwopwimu mono to siriseba wagimokwo ni kototopamasi wo ima si kuyasi mo
tabi no ywo no pisasiku nareba saniturapu pimo tokisakezu kwopuru ko no koro
wagimokwo si a wo sinwopu rasi kusamakura tabi no marone ni sitabimo tokenu
kusamakura tabi no koromo no pimo tokenu omopoyuru kamo ko no tosikoro pa
kusamakura tabi no pimo toku ipye no imo si a wo matikanete nagekapu rasi mo
tamakusiro makinesi imo wo tukwi mo pezu okite ya kwoyemu ko no yama no saki
adusayumi suwe pa siranedo utukusimi kimi ni tagupite yamadi kwoyekinu
kasumi tatu paru no nagapi wo okuka naku siranu yamadi wo kwopwitutu ka komu
yoso nomwi ni kimi wo apimite yuputatami tamuke no yama wo asu ka kwoyeinamu
tamakatuma abesimayama no yuputuyu ni tabine eseme ya nagaki ko no ywo wo
miyuki puru kwosi no opoyama yukisugwite idure no pi ni ka wa ga satwo wo mimu
ide a ga kwoma payaku yukikoso matutiyama matu ramu imo wo yukite paya mimu
asikwi yama konure kotogoto asu ywori pa nabikite arikoso imo ga atari mimu
suzukagapa yaswose watarite ta ga yuwe ka ywogwoye ni kwoyemu tuma mo aranaku ni
wagimokwo ni mata mo apumi no yasunokapa yasui mo nezuni kwopwiwataru kamo
tabi nisite mono wo so omopu siranamino pye ni mo oki ni mo yosu to pa nasi ni
minatwomwi ni mitikuru sipo no iya masini kwopwi pa masaredo wasurayenu kamo
oki tu nami pyenami no kiyoru sada no ura no ko no sada sugwite noti kwopwimu kamo
aritigata arinagusamete yukamedomo ipye n aru imo i obobosimi semu
miwotukusi kokorotukusite omope ka mo koko ni mo motona ime ni si miyuru
wagimokwo ni puru to pa nasi ni ariswomwi ni wa ga koromode pa nurenikyeru kamo
murwo no ura no setwo no saki n aru nakisima no iswo kwosu nami ni nurenikyeru kamo
pototogisu tobatanoura ni siku nami no sikusiku kimi wo mimu yosi moga mo
wagimokwo wo yoso nomwi ya mimu kwosinoumi no kwogata no umi no sima naranaku ni
nami no ma yu kumowi ni miyuru apasima no apanu monoyuwe wa ni yosuru kwora
koromodeno mawakanoura no managwotuti manaku toki nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa
noto no umi ni turi suru ama no izaripwi no pikari ni iikye tukwi matigateri
sika no ama no turi si tomoseru izaripwi no ponokani imo wo mimu yosi moga mo
nanipagata kogiduru pune no parwoparwoni wakarekinuredo wasurekanetu mo
uramwi kogu kumanwobune tuki medurasiku kakete omopanu tukwi mo pi mo nasi
maturabune sawaku poriye no miwo payami kadi toru ma naku omopoyuru kamo
izari suru ama no kadi no oto yukurakani imo pa kokoro ni norinikyeru kamo
wakanoura ni swode sape nurete wasuregapi piripedo imo pa wasurayenaku ni
wakanoura ni swode sape nurete wasuregapi piripedo imo pa wasurekanetu mo
kusamakura tabi ni si woreba karikomono midarete imo ni kwopwinu pi pa nasi
sika no ama no iswo ni kariposu nanoriso no na pa noritesi wo nani ka apikataki
kuni topomi omopi na wabwi so kaze no muta kumo no yuku goto koto pa kaywopamu
tomarinisi pito wo omopu ni akidunwo ni wiru sirakumo no yamu toki mo nasi
ura mo naku inisi kimi yuwe asanasana motona so kwopuru apu to pa nakyedo
sirwotapeno kimi ga sitabimo ware sapeni kyepu musubitena apamu pi no tame
sirwotapeno swode no wakare pa wosikyedomo omopimidarete yurusituru kamo
miyakwopye ni kimi pa inisi wo ta ga toke ka wa ga pimo no wo no yupu te tayusi mo
kusamakura tabi yuku kimi wo pitome opomi swode purazusite amata kuyasi mo
maswokagami te ni torimotite miredo akanu kimi ni okurete ikyeri tomo nasi
kumoriywono tadoki mo siranu yama kwoyete imasu kimi woba itu to ka matamu
tatanaduku awokakiyama no pyenarinaba sibasiba kimi wo kototopazi kamo
asagasumi tanabiku yama wo kwoyete inaba ware pa kwopwimu na apamu pi madeni
asipikwino yama pa momopye ni kakusu tomo imo pa wasurezi tadani apu madeni
asipikwino yama pa momopye ni kakusedomo kimi wo omopaku yamu toki mo nasi
kumowi n aru umiyama kwoyete iyukinaba ware pa kwopwimu na noti pa apinu tomo
yosiweyasi kwopwizi to suredo yupumayama kwoyenisi kimi ga omopoyuraku ni
kusakageno arawi no saki no kasasima wo mitutu ka kimi ga yamadi kwoyu ramu
kusakageno arawi no saki no kasasima wo mitutu ka kimi ga misaka kwoyu ramu
tamakatuma simakumayama no yupugure ni pitori ka kimi ga yamadi kwoyu ramu
tamakatuma simakumayama no yupugwiri ni nagakwopwi situtu inekatenu kamo
iki no wo ni wa ga omopu kimi pa toriganaku aduma no saka wo kyepu ka kwoyu ramu
ipakwiyama tada kwoyekimase iswosaki no konumi no pama ni ware tatimatamu
kasuganwo no asadi ga para ni okurewite toki so to mo nasi wa ga kwopuraku pa
suminoye no kwisi ni mukapyeru apadisima apare to kimi wo ipanu pi pa nasi
asu ywori pa inami no kapa no idete inaba tomareru ware pa kwopwitutu ya aramu
wata no soko oki pa kasikwosi iswomwi ywori kogitamwi yukase tukwi pa penu tomo
kepi no ura ni yosuru siranami sikusikuni imo ga sugata pa omopoyuru kamo
tokitukaze pukepi no pama ni idewitutu akapu inoti pa imo ga tame koso
nikitatu ni punanori semu to kikisi nape nani so mo kimi ga miyekozaru ramu
misagwo wiru su ni wiru pune no kogidenaba uragwopwisikyemu noti pa apinu tomo
tamakadura sakiku yukasane yamasugeno omopimidarete kwopwitutu matamu
okurewite kwopwitutu arazupa tagwonoura no ama naramasi wo tamamo karukaru
tukusidi no ariswo no tamamo karu to kamo kimi pa pisasiku matedo kimasanu
aratamano tosinowo nagaku teru tukwi no akazaru kimi ya asu wakarenamu
pisaniaramu kimi wo omopu ni pisakatano kiywoki tukuywo mo yamwi nomwi ni miyu
kasuga n aru mikasanoyama ni wiru kumo wo ide miru gotoni kimi wo si so omopu
asipikwino katayamakigisi tatiyukamu kimi ni okurete utusikyeme ya mo
tamanowono utusigokoro ya yaswoka kake kogidemu pune ni okurete woramu
yaswoka kake simagakurinaba wagimokwo ga tomare to puramu swode miyezi kamo
kamunadukwi sigure no ame ni nuretutu ka kimi ga yuku ramu yadwo ka karu ramu
kamunadukwi amama mo okazu puriniseba idure no satwo no yadwo ka karamasi
sirwotapeno swode no wakare wo katamisite aratu no pama ni yadori suru kamo
kusamakura tabi yuku kimi wo aratu made okuri so kinuru akidarane koso
aratu no umi ware nusa maturi ipapitemu paya kapyerimase omogapari sezu
asanasana tukusi no kata wo ide mitutu ne nomwi so wa ga naku ita mo subye nami
toyokuni no kiku no nagapama yukikurasi pi no kurenureba imo wo si so omopu
toyokuni no kiku no takapama takatakani kimi matu ywora pa saywo pukenikyeri
